handles: creating → populate ULID prefix `lng_`
creating → validate geography_language_id resolves to a real geography::Language row (integrity guard beyond the FK)
creating → when geography_country_id is set, verify the bcp47_code region subtag matches geography::Country.iso2 (e.g. bcp47_code='fr-CA' must pair with a country row iso2='CA')
creating → derive bcp47_code default when not explicit: `{geographyLanguage.code}{-script_code?}{-geographyCountry.iso2?}`
creating → refuse when the (geography_language_id, geography_country_id, script_code) triple already exists (defends against the composite unique index race)
deleting → refuse when any TenantLocale references this row (soft delete only via archive)
creating → populate ULID prefix `wsl_`
creating → consume 1 unit of localization.locales.count entitlement (throws QuotaExceeded when cap reached)
creating → fire LanguageEnabledForTenant
updating (is_default flipped) → set is_default=false on other rows for this tenant (invariant: exactly one default)
updating (is_fallback flipped) → same invariant for at most one fallback
deleting → refuse when is_default=true (must promote another locale first)
deleted → fire LanguageDisabledForTenant + optionally cascade delete tenant-specific Translation rows when ?purge=true
creating → populate ULID prefix `trn_`
creating → denormalise locale_code from PlatformLanguage.bcp47_code
creating → refuse when quality_score < tenant_locale.min_quality_score (returns null; caller records failure)
created → invalidate in-memory LRU cache for (tenant_id, locale_code, namespace, key)
updating (source='human' + verified_at=now()) → fire TranslationOverridden
updating (source_hash mismatch detected) → set is_stale=true
creating → populate ULID prefix `tjb_`
creating → refuse when tenant has an in-flight job for the same (kind, target_locale_codes) unless force flag
created → fire TranslationJobStarted
updating (state → completed) → fire TranslationJobCompleted
updating (state → failed) → fire TranslationJobFailedNotification
